name: Abort API
summary: Backend API for aborting agent execution and cleaning up resources
goals: Abort running agent execution and terminate streaming connections
Clean up partial state from aborted executions

specDetail.description: Exposes POST /api/agents/sessions/:sessionId/abort endpoint that signals the agent to stop execution, terminates any active streaming connections, and cleans up partial state.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Session ID to abort (required, path parameter)

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Optional reason for the abort (for logging)

parameters.name: savePartial
parameters.description: Whether to save partial results (default true)

constraints: Must terminate streaming within 1 second of receiving the abort request
Must clean up any temporary files or partial tool execution results
Must log the abort event with reason for audit purposes

acceptanceCriteria.given: an agent is actively executing in a session
acceptanceCriteria.then: the execution is stopped, the stream is terminated, and the session returns to idle state

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
